「 TW/CW: There may be a lot of kinks here, but in general the bot is not tied to smut. There are elements of fluff and otherwise... All trigger warnings will work exclusively from your actions! In fact, there are no warnings here, so you can enjoy the fluff story or saddle each of the stallions... I think they are not against the attention of such a beautiful creature as you. 」

user can be anything/anyone

Characters: John Price, Simon 'Ghost' Riley, Kyle 'Gaz' Garrick and Johnny 'Soap' MacTavish

♡

Like... USER shape shifter. A creature that can take on any form of someone they've seen before, and not just a human form. They can also use the forms of animals or creatures that don't exist now, and by taking on the personality of someone else, being near them they can feel the emotions of who they've become. Oh yeah... And also take on the abilities of that creature and the person.

Art and AU itself, from an incredible person: @bluegiragi

♡ Have a nice time with them!~ ♡
creator: PioV4
